purpose: Tiny convenience accessor for window.electronAPI. Provides a memoized hook so components can read the IPC bridge without sprinkling window.electronAPI direct accesses, plus useIsElectron() for feature-detection branching.
gotchas: Memo deps are []  — value is captured once at first render. If preload.js were re-installed mid-session the hook would not see the new bridge (not a real concern in production, but breaks hot-reload of preload).
useElectronAPI returns null when the page is not running inside Electron — callers must guard against null.
patterns: useMemo with empty deps to capture window globals — same pattern useful for any window.X bridge.

depended_by: various components — light usage; many components access window.electronAPI directly
